about.title: About XTeam
about.subtitle: Leading IT solutions provider
about.description: Founded in 2013, XTeam has been delivering premium software solutions to enterprises worldwide. Our commitment to innovation and customer success drives everything we do.

pricing.a: We offer flexible pricing models including fixed-price projects, time-and-materials, and managed services. Contact us for a customized quote.

timeline.q: What is the typical project timeline?
timeline.a: Timeline varies based on project complexity. Most projects take 2-6 months. We'll provide a detailed schedule during initial consultation.

tech.a: We use modern tech stacks including React, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, and cloud platforms like AWS and Azure.

support.q: What support do you provide after launch?
support.a: We provide 24/7 technical support, maintenance, updates, and ongoing optimization for all deployed solutions.
